creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
What a year! 

2023 caught me off guard. 
It’s the toughest year by far, yet the most beautiful one. I lost my biggest goal, but found the greatest blessing. And despite of all the pain and suffering, I am truly grateful I lived. ❤️‍🩹🙏🏻

THANK YOU for being with me through all these.
Happy New Year! 🎉

🎥 In this reel:
• Costa Azzura at The Pointe
• Keturah Reserve
• Pier Chic
• Kite Beach Umm Al Quwain
• City Walk
• The Ruins in the Philippines 
• Mediclinic City Hospital 
• Museum of the Future
• BBQ spot near Business Bay bridge 

#ladyandhersweetescapes #yearend #2023recap #Dubai #UAE #DubaiBlogger #UAEBlogger #DubaiReels

transcription.text: The end of 2023 has finally come. What a strange, beautiful, challenging year. Make sure you look after yourself in the next one.
